## Commit Message Convention

<!-- Check one -->

- [ ] My commits follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) standard

**Commit format examples:**
- `feat: add family deletion with orphan guard`
- `fix: prevent removing user's last family membership`
- `docs: update deployment instructions`
- `refactor: migrate to active_family_id property`
- `test: add tests for family deletion cascade`
